conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Planning the team offsite -- Lake Tahoe, Austin, and Asheville are the top picks.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Lake Tahoe looks great but flights are expensive and inconvenient for half the team on the east coast.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Austin is a fun city but a couple people mentioned it's gotten pretty pricey for group bookings lately.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to submit my timesheet before the deadline today.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Asheville splits the flight time pretty evenly between the east and west coast folks on the team.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Submitted the timesheet just under the wire.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Got quotes for a group venue in Asheville and it came in noticeably cheaper than the Austin option.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Lake Tahoe is probably out just given how spread out the team is geographically.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My phone update this morning took forever to install.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Double-checked flight costs from both coasts to Asheville and they're within an hour of each other, unlike Tahoe or Austin.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We're doing the offsite in Asheville. It splits flight time evenly for both coasts and came in cheaper than Austin.

query: Where did the team decide to hold the offsite?
